import io
import string

fn find_eq(_ s: String) -> Option<Int>
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut result: Option<Int> = None
  mut done = false
  while not done
    if i >= n
      done = true
    else
      match string.byte_at(s, i)
      when Some(b)
        if b == 61
          result = Some(i)
          done = true
        end
      when None
        done = true
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
  end
  result
end

fn main() -> Unit
  mut running = true
  while running
    match io.read_line()
    when Some(line)
      match find_eq(line)
      when Some(idx)
        let key = string.substring(line, 0, idx)
        let value = string.substring(line, idx + 1, string.len(line))
        println("#{key}:#{value}")
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      running = false
    end
  end
end
